name: com.snake.twitch-controller
description: Stream Deck plugin for controlling Twitch tabs

scripts.deploy: npm run build && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const p=require('path');const src='com.snake.twitch-controller.sdPlugin';const dest=p.join(process.env.APPDATA,'Elgato/StreamDeck/Plugins',src);fs.cpSync(src,dest,{recursive:true,force:true});console.log('Deployed to',dest)"
